overview.mockNotice: Design preview — strategies and positions below are mock fixtures. No funds move in this flow.
overview.positionsEmpty: No positions yet. Deposit into a strategy to start earning.
overview.redemptionsDescription: Delayed-liquidity withdrawals settle here when their redemption window passes.
overview.strategiesDescription: Yield strategies published by vault-infra providers and reviewed by curators.

risk.conservativeDescription: Tokenized money-market funds and short treasuries. Instant liquidity, steadiest yield.
risk.balancedDescription: Blue-chip DeFi lending and short-duration RWAs. Instant to T+2 redemption.
risk.enhancedDescription: Higher-yield credit strategies with longer redemption windows.

withdraw.title: Withdraw
withdraw.previewInstantDefiCaveat: Subject to protocol liquidity — full utilization can delay settlement (see strategy terms).
withdraw.previewDelayed: Funds become available {date}. This amount stops earning now and settles when the redemption window passes.
withdraw.errorAmountRequired: Enter an amount greater than zero.

wizard.profileDescription: Pick the yield and liquidity trade-off that fits this treasury.
wizard.strategyDescription: Strategies matching your risk profile, with curator and liquidity terms up front.
wizard.amountDescription: Choose the funding wallet, stablecoin, and amount to deposit.
wizard.reviewDescription: Confirm the deposit details before submitting.
wizard.noStrategiesForFilters: No strategies match these filters yet. Adjust the risk profile or curator.
wizard.splitHelp: Pick multiple strategies and set each allocation — the deposit splits across them and must total 100%.
wizard.byokHelp: Bring your own key: SDP builds the transaction and you sign it from your own wallet. Funds never touch an SDP custody account.
wizard.errorAmountRequired: Enter an amount greater than zero.
wizard.summaryEmpty: Your selections appear here as you go.
wizard.mockConfirmNote: Design preview: confirming records a mock position locally — no funds move.
wizard.successDescription: Your position is live. Track it from the Earn overview.
